section_name: Prohibition on Disclosure and Use of Personal Information from Motor Vehicle Records
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, including Chapter 552 (Public Information) , Government Code, except as provided by Sections 730.005-730.007, an agency may not disclose personal information about any person obtained by the agency in connection with a motor vehicle record.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 730. Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act
##### § 730.004 — Prohibition on Disclosure and Use of Personal Information from Motor Vehicle Records

Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, including Chapter 552 (Public Information) , Government Code, except as provided by Sections 730.005-730.007, an agency may not disclose personal information about any person obtained by the agency in connection with a motor vehicle record.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1187, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1997. Amended by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 1032, Sec. 7, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.*
